description: Partnership deed regarding a money exchange store. Around 1085. Yahya b. Eli b. Yosef Kohen Fasi and Sason b. Natan agree to have a partnership. Yahya would be the main partner with investing 90% of the money, and Sason would invest the rest but would do most of the work. The goal for their investment is to increase money for trading partnerships. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #811) VMR
